markets.no_sub_title: UFC
markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump says UFC as part of Jake Paul interview, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the Jake Paul interview will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Jake Paul interview will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. - Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
For the purpose of this market, the "Jake Paul interview" refers to the first full length release of the interview. To be clear, an extended version released after the full length interview will not count. 
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.
